title: Universal Tool Aluminum Jewelers Eye Loupe Set 2.5X 5X 7.5X 10X Magnifiers 4pc
description:
If you're a jewelry maker or hobby craft enthusiast, you've probably found yourself in a situation where you could use a better look at tiny gems, beads or other materials. With the Universal Tool 4 Piece Magnifier Loupe Set, you'll be able to do just that! Jeweler's loupes are simple yet effective magnification devices designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes generally have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupes feature an aluminum body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may mar the view of the small items you're working with. This set of loupes comes with 4 different magnification powers - 2.5X, 5X, 7

Universal Tool Aluminum Jewelers Eye Loupe Set 2.5X 5X 7.5X 10X Magnifiers 4pc

If you're a jewelry maker or hobby craft enthusiast, you've probably found yourself in a situation where you could use a better look at tiny gems, beads or other materials. With the Universal Tool 4 Piece Magnifier Loupe Set, you'll be able to do just that!

Jeweler's loupes are simple yet effective magnification devices designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes generally have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupes feature an aluminum body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may mar the view of the small items you're working with.

Key Features

  • VARYING MAGNIFICATION POWERS - 4 Piece Set of Loupes with 2.5X, 5X, 7.5X and 10X Magnification | Ideal Set for Jewelry Makers, Watch Repairs and Hobby Crafters Placing, Setting and Identifying Tiny Materials
  • ALUMINUM BODY - Chrome-colored Aluminum Body Protects Lens from Scratches and Fingerprints When Not in Use | Durable Yet Lightweight Material Also Doubles as Handle for Ease of Use
  • 1 INCH DIAMETER LENS - Small Lens is Perfect Size for Viewing Beads, Gems, Rhinestones, Jewels, Sequins and Other Materials Requiring Precision
  • CLEAR CARRY CASE - Transparent Carrying Case with Snap-shut Lids Stores and Organizes Loupes When not In Use | Easily Identify the Loupe You Need
  • VERSATILE MAGNIFIERS - Designed for Jewelry Making but Great for Watchmaking/Repair, Photography, Printing, Dentistry, Tattooing, Biology/Geology, Coin Collecting and More

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UT10XJLALUM4PC
  • UPC: 855569007386
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 4 Piece

This set of loupes comes with 4 different magnification powers - 2.5X, 5X, 7.5X and 10X which will give you a variety of magnifiers to work with. These loupes can provide a significant improvement when viewing intricate details and will help jewelers, watchmakers or photographers pinpoint areas that need extra attention. Each lens has a diameter of 1" making them an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision.

As stated previously, all of the loupes are housed inside of a durable yet lightweight aluminum body to protect the lens, and measures just 1.25" tall so they can easily fit inside just about any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. We've even included a snap-lid carrying case to house your loupes, and each loupe sits in its own individual container so you'll only need to open the lid for the loupe you need. The case is transparent so you can easily determine which loupe to grab. Keep in mind that loupes are meant to be used with the lens close to the item you're magnifying so that they work properly.

In addition to jewelry making, watch repairs and other precision hobby crafts, loupes are great tools for other professions like printing, dentistry, geology, electronics repair and even tattooing! This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details.
